violations.text: The door to the outside, located in the front entrance and vestibule, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 04/16/2026

The door to the outside, located in the kitchen, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/02/2025

The floors under the cookline has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 12/11/2025

Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the kitchen. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/18/2025

Employees' medicines were not stored to prevent the contamination of food, equipment, or utensils. Medicines moved to designated areas at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/18/2025

The door to the outside, located in the back of the kitchen, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 12/02/2025

The lowboy next to the front entrance of the kitchen was observed with a frayed gasket. Equipment components such as doors, seals, hinges, fasteners, and kick plates shall be kept intact, tight, and adjusted in accordance with manufacturer's specifications. New Violation. Correct By: 12/02/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the hood ventilation system have an accumulation of dust. The non-food contact surfaces must be cleaned as often as necessary to prevent contamination of food. New Violation. Correct By: 11/18/2025

The following was observed of the physical facilities: 1) The ceiling in the ware-washing area is covered with tiles that are not smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. 2) The floors in the ware-washing area are constructed of exposed cement, which is not durable, easily cleanable, or non-absorbent. The materials for indoor floors must be durable, easily cleanable and nonabsorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms. New Violation. Correct By: 12/18/2025

Employees' clothing or other personal belongings were observed stored hanging on the dry storage rack. Lockers or other suitable facilities shall be used for the orderly storage of employees' clothing and other possessions. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/18/2025
Handwashing sinks through establishment is lacking handwashing signage.A sign or poster is required to remind food employees to wash their hands. New Violation. Correct By: 11/10/2023

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of biofilm. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch.PIC voluntarily disposed of ice. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/06/2023

Thermometers are lacking in the all refrigeration unit(s). Cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. New Violation. Correct By: 11/10/2023

Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored on a surface that is not clean in the back kitchen area. New Violation. Correct By: 11/06/2023
The non-food contact surfaces of the front counter area have an accumulation of dust, dirt, small accumulation old rodent droppings. New Violation. Correct By: 11/06/2023

The sink used for food preparation is lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. New Violation. Correct By: 11/13/2023

The floors behind equipment throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 11/06/2023
The ceilings in the kitchen area is in poor repair(observed water stains). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 11/06/2023
